titleStmt.title: SII 25.28: original edition by M. D. Sampath
No. 28. (A.R. No. 28 of 1908.) TIRUPPANANDĀḶ, KUMBAKONAM TALUK, THANJAVUR DISTRICT.

summary.p: East wall of the first prākāra of the Aruṇajaṭēśvarasvāmi temple.
This record commences with the praśasti of the king, Pūmaruviya-poḻil-ēḻum, etc.

It records the sale of 375 vēli of wet and dry lands by Śēndaṉ Kūttāḍuvāṉ alias Rājarāja-vaṅgāra-muttaraiyaṉ, of Peṇṇāgaḍam alias Muḍigoṇḍaśōḻa-chaturvēdimaṅgalam, a brahmadēya village in Virudarājabhayaṅkara-vaḷanāḍu to one Aḻiyāviradaṅkaṇḍār-Tīyilumpiriyār alias Kuṅgiliyakkalaiyar, for a value of 1000 aṉṟāḍu-naṟkāśu. The land, thus sold, is mentioned to be in possession of the seller since it was purchased in his name by his father Sēndar alias Vāṇakularāyar from one Vāḷavarāyaṉ of Kīḻkarai-Kāṭṭuppaḷḷi of the same nāḍu. The purchaser is referred to here as a worshipper of the famous Śaiva saint Tirukkaḍavūr-Kuṅgiliyakkalaiyāṇḍār, who is described to have prepared the deity Tiruttāṭakēśvaram-uḍaiyār at Tiruppanandāḷ in Maṇṇi-nāḍu.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
nataṅkaṟppuyantana maṟaiyo toḻilvaḷan Ellārun tanitta niyeyil vāḻuntaṉamiyāmeṉa makuḻa Oru varuṭan Oruvaṟkkum Onṟiṉuṭan Onṟiṉukkum veruvarukai maṉattinṟi viḻaintu kātaluṭan cena Inti nanmutaṟṟi cāpāla neṇmaruvoruvaṭivāki vantapaṭiyeṉaninṟuma
ṉu vāṇai tani naṭātti māliyāṉai piṇippuṇ paṉmaṇic cilampe yāṟṟuvana celoṭaiye kalakkuṇ paṉputemāve vaṭuppaṭuvana māmalane kaṭiyavāyina varupuṉale ciṟaippaṭuvana kāvukaḷe koṭiya vāyina kaḷḷuṇpaṉavaṇṭukaḷe poyyu vaṉa veye ponmalivaṉa Eḻu kaḻaniye mayyuṭaiyana neṭuvanaiye maruḷuṭaiyana IṉaRead ‘maṉattilum’mānkaḷe kayalkkulame piṟantoḻukum pakaittāya nekaṭintoṟuppān Iyaṟppulavane poruḷkeṭppān Icaippāṇaney
kūṭañceyvānenṟu kūvankākkun tirunāṭṭi niyalvituve naṉinṟu kāval neṟi pūṇṭu neṟiyallatu niṉaiyātu tantaiyil lontantaiyākiyum tāyanillon tāyanākiyu main=tanillon maintaṉākiyum naṉuyinkaṭkku yitadākiyum viḻi peṟṟa payanenṉavum mey peṟṟa Aruḷenṉavum mukam peṟṟapaṉuvalenṉavum Ettuṟaikkum Iṟaiva nenṉavum yanañcey perun=tavame naṉavum muttamiṭ kuttalaiva nenṉavum muṟṟulakiḷ mutalva nenṉavum Anaiciyaṟkai muṟai niṟut
ti Allavaikaṭin=tāṟuyttuy porukaliyin Iruḷ nikki pukaḻenṉum nilāpparappi kanṉaṭarum kāliṅkarum tenṉavarum ciṅkaḷarum kekaiyarum koṅkaṇarum kūpakarum kāśyaparum kāmpocarum kocalarum kon=taḷarum papḷarum pāñcālarum poppaḷarum pūluvarum mattinarum manāṭṭarum
ṉuttavarum mākatarum koṭivaṭaṅkutan kopurak koṟṟavācal van=tiṉṭi Iṭutiṟaikaḷaneka koṭiyāliyaṟ pāvala vakaṟṟikkarumāmukil tiruniṟuttu kakanakkaṇvan rājarājan tirumānvilun=tirut toḷilum tirumantiRead ‘maṉattilum’
tilum piriyātu man=tānakkuḻuliyaṟ kon makuṭa cūḷāma tnamtilata coḷakulātnam pūmakaḷilum jayamakaḷilum puvimakaḷilum nāmakaḷilum puvimakaṉilum nāmakaḷilu mutaṟ teviyāy nātuṅkaṟkivaḷena pānanai carperun=teviyar pallāṇṭenṟaṭi perāp perācutaninaṭātti peṇ ṇaracāyamuṭicūṭiuṭanāṇai Uṭanāḷaiyum Uṭan ciṟappum Uṭan Irukkaiyum kaṭanāka veypaṭaittaruḷi Aṟampurakkuṅ karuṇai valli kavalaiyaṟappacumpuravikkaṭ viṭṭerkaṭavivarun=tavaṉa kulattulakan toḻavan=taruḷiya cān=tidotayam nāṇa mutaṟkkuṇa nārkum nal
loḻukkumum peruṅkaṟppum peṇumayiṟkkulatipam tiruvan=tappurap perumāḷ Akilaloka mātar veṉṟāraṇaṅkaḷoru nānkum kalvarun=tani nāyaki puvanamuḻutuṭaiyāḷm Akkirāmakkaliya vālaru maḻai poḻi kuḷir veṇkuṭaic cakkaravaṟtti cenanātan taraṇimayintan laṅkalmalaṟ colai Āluṅkiḷiyavankātaṟ poru rupa pāṟkaṭalviḷai yāṭum peṭaiya naṉm po ṭi mayil pūloka cunta niyām perpaṭaitta ṉānmukatton perum paṭappai paḻakkum paṇai vaiyyamettu m
camaṉtakamaṇimāntan puṉaikaṉattuva maṇitayyalāṟ koru cūḷāmaṇi cakatēkacin=tāmaṇi puṇṇiya moru vaṭivukoṇṭu pukaḻenṉumaṇi puṇantu pen=ta nirvaḻi yomaṭiyomenamunṉinṟu toḻutettamutalmai peṟṟa mulanāyaki Inam poḻiyuṅkavi rā yāṉaiyoṭu ter kaṭāvatta nam poḻiyum Irācarācan tāy veḷai taritta poṟkoṭi Icaimuḻutum kuṇamuḻutum koṭaimuḻutum Eḻilmuḻutum ticaimuḻutu maṇ muḻutu
m tirumuḻutum Uṭaiyaḷāki munṉamutulakuyya muṭicūṭum Irācapaṇṭitan taṉṉai muḻutuṭaiya tevi taraṇi muḻutuṭaiyāḷum pārvāḻavu maṟaivāḻavum palatuval vāḻavum malāṭa kulattava tarittutticaiviḷakkup peṇmaiyuṭain peruṅ malarmicai naṭāttuṅkuyil Ulakuṭai mukkokkiḻā naṭikaḷenṉum Alakil kaṟppillā vin=tamaṭantaiyum tirun=tiya tanperuṅkuṇattāl ciṟan=toṅka Aṟampākkum Aruñtutiyena varum peru Avani muḻutuṭaiyāḷum maṉṉiya perumpukaḻḻuṭaitta te
vankiḻānaṭikaṉum Ūḻiyūḻipalakaṟppil vāḻi maṇam puṇan=tiruppa Utaiyakiri Ucceṟi mati veṇ kuṭaipputu niḻaṟkkiḻ can=tiramukamaṇṭalattu tirumalarmakaḷ te Uṭanirun=tatena cempon vīrasiṁhāsanattu Avani muḻutuṭaiyāḷoṭum vīṟṟirun=taruḷiya kopparakecari paṉmarāna tiripuvaṉac cakkaravaṟttikaḷ śrīrājarājadevaṟkku yāṇṭu 10 8 Āvatu vaṭakarai virutarāja bhayaṅkaravaḷa nāṭṭu brahmadeyan taniyūr peṇṇākaṭamāna muṭikoṇṭa coḻac carup
petimaṅkalattup paḷḷikkāṇiyuṭaiya cen=tankūttāṭuvā nāna rājarājavaṅkāra muttaraiya nen nilavilai Āvaṇam Ināṭṭumaṇṇi nāṭṭut tiruppanan=tāḷ The name of this god found in other inscriptions from the same temple (Nos. 2947 of 1914) is tiruttāṭakeśvaramuṭaiyār • śvaramuṭaiyāraic cevveḻun=taruḷivitta tirukkaṭavūṟ kuṅkiliyak kalaiyāṇṭārn=taci pātantuppaṇi ceytirukkum Aḻiyāvātaṅkoṇṭār tīyilum rāṉa kuṅkiliyakkalaiyaṟku nānviṟṟuk kuṭutta nilamāvatu Ināṭṭukkiḻ kāraikkāṭṭup paḷḷi vāḷavarāyan pakkal En tamappan
(c)ain=tarānavāṇa kularāyar En perile poruḷiṭṭu vilai koṇṭu Ennutāy varukiṟa neṭuñceri yenṟu perkūvappaṭṭa Ūr nilam kāleyaraik kālināl nelp payir ceyyu nilamu ḷḷiṭṭuppun payir ceyyu nilamuḻuṭpaṭa nilam 3 100 7 10 5 veli Innila munnūṟṟeḻupattaiv velikkum kiḻ pāṟkellai rājendra coḻap perāṟṟukku meṟkum tenpāṟkellai Ivvāṟṟukku vaṭakkum melpāṟkellai cerukuṭi � ṇṭiyum Irāca neriyum Akappaṭac ceñlūr I
nāyan kuṟucciyil nattattukku Āṟṟūr veḷiyile puṟappaṭa Itaṉai kal Āṟṟūr veḷakku vicaiyekiḻakku nokkip po kkuṟuk kkut tekum Ivvicaitta perunār kellaiyuḷ naṭuvupaṭṭa nilam munnūṟṟu v veliyum Ivaṟkuviṟukkuṭuttukkoḷvatāna Emmicai tevalaip poruḷ Aṉṟāṭu naṟpa kācu 1000 Ikkācu Āyiramuṅkāṭ ṭeṟṟi Āvaṇakkaṇiye kaiccelavaṟak koṇṭu viṟṟu vilaiyāvaṇañ ceytu kuṭutten Ivvaḻiyā virataṅkoṇṭārtiyilum na kuṅkiliyakkalaiyaṟku Iccen=tan kūt nāna rājarāja- vaṅkāra muttaraiyanen In nilattukku Ituve vilai yāvatākavum Itu veporumāvaṟutip poruḷc cilavolai yāvatākavum Ituvallatu veṟu porumāvaṟuti poruḷ cilavolai kāṭṭak kaṭavatallatākavum Ippaṭi
vilaikkaṟaviṟṟu poruḷaṟak koṇṭu viṟṟu vilaiyāvaṇañ ceytu kuṭutten Iv vaḻiyā virataṅkoṇṭār tīyilum piriyātārāna kuṅkiliya vaṅkāra muttaraiya nen I ṅkaḷum Innilattālvanta Urimaikaḷum Akappaṭaviṟṟukkuṭutten Ivvaḻiyā virataṅkoṇṭār tīyilum piriyātārāna kuṅkiliyaṟku cen=tan kūttāṭuvā
nāna rājarāja vaṅkāra muttaraiyanen Ivar colla Inta vilaip piramāṇam Eḻutinen brahmadeyam tiruppanantāḷmadhyasdhan paran=tāṉūruṭaiyān Ikkācu Āyiramuṅ kaikkoṇ taraiyanen Ivaiyenneḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai cen=tan vāṇakularāyan Eḻuttu § Ippaṭikku Ivai kūttāṭuvān Āḷappiṟantān Eḻuttu ....ippa
ṭikku Ivai kūttāṭuvān ciṟaimīṭṭāṉ Eḻuttu .. Ippaṭi Aṟiveṉ Atikāram kaṅkaikoṇṭaveḷān Eḻuttu ..ippaṭi Aṟiveṉ m poruṭaiyān Eḻuttu Ippaṭi Aṟiven muvaraiyānen Ivai En Eḻuttu ..
Digital edition of SII 25.28 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
